mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holidays (holiday_date, name, created_at) VALUES (#{holiday.holidayDate}, #{holiday.name}, #{holiday.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT holiday_date, name, created_at FROM holidays ORDER BY holiday_date ASC
SELECT holiday_date, name, created_at FROM holidays WHERE holiday_date >= MAKE_DATE(#{year}, 1, 1) AND holiday_date < MAKE_DATE(#{year} + 1, 1, 1) ORDER BY holiday_date ASC
